---
name: Documentation request
about: Create a documentation request to help improve the documentation
title: "[Documentation]: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---
**Title**: [A concise title for the documentation request]

---

**Description**:  
[A clear and detailed description of what documentation is needed or what needs to be improved]

---

**Reason for Request**:  
[Explain why this documentation is important. What gap does it fill? How will it benefit users?]

---

**Proposed Changes**:  
[Outline specific changes or additions you suggest. This could include new sections, examples, or clarifications.]

---

**Related Documentation**:  
[If applicable, link to existing documentation that is relevant to this request]

---

**Additional Context**:  
[Any other context that might be helpful, such as user feedback, related issues, or examples from other projects]
